---
title: "benchmark_engine.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/benchmark_engine.py"
loc: 42
complexity: 6
logic_score: 3.75
style_score: 3.94
intel_score: 7.11
overall_score: 5.22
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating BenchmarkOrchestrator, execute.

## Interaction Protocol
Import BenchmarkOrchestrator and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 24 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [statistics](file://statistics)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.report_engine](file://src.core.report_engine)

### Exports
- `BenchmarkOrchestrator`
- `execute`
